title: Star Online Funny Teacher Christmas Mug “All I Want is My Students to Stop Saying 6 7” Meme Gift, 11oz Ceramic Coffee Cup, Secret Santa Presents for Teachers & Colleagues (67 Meme)
features: Funny Teacher Christmas Mug: A hilarious festive mug featuring the trending “All I Want Is My Students To Stop Saying 6 7” meme perfect for adding humour to classroom mornings and teacher coffee breaks.
Ideal Teacher Xmas Gifts: A brilliant choice for Christmas gifts for teachers, teaching assistants, tutors, or school staff who enjoy funny classroom jokes and festive novelty items.
Perfect Secret Santa Present: Designed for staff rooms and office exchanges, this Christmas teacher mug makes a standout Secret Santa gift for colleagues, educators, and friends.
Durable 11oz Ceramic Coffee Cup: Made from high-quality ceramic with a comfortable handle, this 11oz mug is microwave and dishwasher safe, ideal for daily coffee, tea or hot chocolate.
Festive Classroom & Office Humour: A great seasonal addition to desks, classrooms, and teacher workspaces, bringing light-hearted Christmas cheer and laughter throughout the holidays.
description: Make your teacher’s Christmas extra fun with this hilarious “All I Want Is My Students To Stop Saying 6 7” meme mug the perfect mix of humour and festive cheer for the classroom or staff room. Designed as a funny Christmas gift for teachers, teaching assistants and colleagues, this 11oz ceramic coffee cup is ideal for everyday use, whether they’re drinking morning coffee, tea, or winter hot chocolate. Printed with a bright, long-lasting festive design, it makes a brilliant Secret Santa present that stands out during office or school gift exchanges. Its durable ceramic build, comfortable handle, and microwave-and-dishwasher-safe finish ensure it’s practical as well as entertaining. A great Christmas present for teachers who appreciate trending humour, this novelty mug is sure to spark laughter and become a favourite during the holiday season.
